description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical juice container with a whimsical, hand-drawn label featuring a smiling orange character waving and the word 'Blend' in colorful, playful script. The front of the packaging also displays a yellow badge reading 'EXTRA SO!' and a light blue background. The sides of the container reveal a layered, multicolored depiction of juice or fruit segments, with visible pink, green, and blue sections, some adorned with flower motifs. The back of the container is less detailed, showing mostly the colored layers and abstract patterns. The container appears to be made of a transparent or semi-transparent material, likely plastic, allowing the vibrant interior to be partially visible.
description: A tall, cylindrical juice container with a playful orange character and colorful, layered fruit illustrations on a semi-transparent body.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with a smiling orange character, the word 'Blend', and a yellow 'EXTRA SO!' badge on a blue background.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the layered, multicolored interior and abstract patterns, with less visible branding.
description_view_2: The back view displays the colorful, stacked fruit or juice layers, including pink, green, and blue sections with flower motifs.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the vertical alignment of the colored layers and abstract patterns, with minimal label detail.
